title: Vanilla Odyssey
description: Mainly created for my modded server but felt like I can put it up on modrinth so, here it is.
body:
# **🌟 Vanilla Odyssey Modpack 🌟**

Ready to take Minecraft to the next level? This modpack completely transforms vanilla while keeping its soul. Explore, fight, craft, and glide through a world that's familiar yet totally fresh!

## **🎨 Theme & Adventure**
- Overhauls vanilla structures and adds **new, lore-friendly ones**.  
- Key mods for exploration: **Dungeons and Taverns**, **Incendium**, **Stellarity LITE**.  
- Discover hidden dungeons, mysterious ruins, and epic landmarks at every turn.  
- Feel the thrill of a world where **every biome tells a story**.

## **⚙️ Compatibility**
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.7  
- **Mod Loader:** Fabric  
- Optimized for smooth gameplay even with lots of mods installed.

## **🌍 New Features**
- **Incendium:** Dive into mysterious, new Nether landscapes full of danger and treasure.  
- **Friends and Foes:** Fan-voted mobs bring new challenges and battles.  
- **Advanced Netherite:** Equip next-level armor & tools and feel unstoppable.  
- Hidden surprises await for those who dare to venture off the beaten path!

## **💡 QOL**
- **Right Click Harvest:** Farming made easy and satisfying.  
- **Hang Glider:** Soar like a bird across mountains & forests.  
- **Trade Cycling:** Villager trades now smarter, not harder.  
- **Easy Access to Essentials:** Craft, manage, and survive smarter, not harder.

## **🌐 Multiplayer Ready**
- Fully optimized for SMP. Play with friends and **cooperate, compete, or explore together**.  
- Show off builds, fight epic bosses, or trade rare items with fellow players.

## **📝 Updates**
- Fresh content drops every 2–3 weeks to keep your world evolving.  
- Expect new biomes, mobs, gear, and secrets with each update.  
- Always something new to explore, craft, and conquer!

## **✨ Why use mine?**
- A perfect **blend of vanilla charm and new adventures**.  
- Engaging **exploration, combat, and building** experience.  
- The world feels alive, challenging, and fun from the first block to the last."




⚠️ **Note:** This modpack was originally created for a **modded server**, so you may encounter compatibility issues when using early releases of the pack.  

In particular, the mod **Frostiful** requires both the client *and* the server to have it installed. If you try to join a vanilla or Paper server while using Frostiful, you may see a **"Network Protocol Error"**. To avoid this, make sure the server matches your mod setup.
